name: Cloak of the Night Thief
description: Notes Since this cloak has the same cooldown as the Snake Eye Ring, it provides the highest speed stat bonus possible of the cloaks that allow the most effecient application of the speedy proc. However, based on overall effective speed, it still falls short to the Planewalker, since teleportation is much faster than speedy.
effects: After exiting sneak: Fire 2 additional projectiles dealing damage equal to your Lethal Strike damage for 2.4 seconds. Sneak: Invisible for 5 seconds. After 1 second can be canceled by shooting. On Invisible end: Lethal Strike: Your weapon deals 45 (+2 per WIS > 34) and 35% (+0.5% per WIS > 34) of target’s defense as additional damage for 2.4 seconds MP Cost: 2 MP/proj Cooldown: 0.1 sec
